prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of MRK (Merck & Co), the stock typically exhibits daily volatility of approximately 1.2-1.5%. Using a geometric Brownian motion model with assumed daily volatility of 1.3% and slight positive drift reflecting pharmaceutical sector stability, the 20-day forecast shows modest upward movement with increasing uncertainty over time. The confidence intervals widen appropriately to reflect the compound uncertainty over the 20-day period, with the 90% CI spanning roughly ±4% from the point estimate.
